memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Challenge

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Challenge

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetChallengesResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteModelsChallengeSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteModelsChallengeSortBy::UPDATED_AT_DESC, EAccelByteModelsChallengeStatus Status=EAccelByteModelsChallengeStatus::NONE, uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20, FString Keyword=TEXT(""), TArray< FString > const &Tags={})
memberdef.name: GetChallenges

briefdescription.para: Send a request to get all challenges.

parameterdescription.para: Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Determines the returned sort order of the challenges, defaults to EAccelByteModelsChallengeSortBy::UPDATED_AT_DESC
Determines how the returned challenge list should be filtered, defaults to EAccelByteModelsChallengeStatus::NONE
Number of challenges to skip when returning the challenge list, defaults to 0
Number of challenges that should be included in the challenge list, defaults to 20
String challenge code for the specific challenge list
Array of tag strings used to filter resulting challenge list

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChallengeCode, int32 Index, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeProgressResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &GoalCode=TEXT(""), uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20, TArray< FString > const &Tags={})
memberdef.name: GetPreviousChallengeProgresses

briefdescription.para: Send a request to get previous challenge progresses.

parameterdescription.para: String code for the challenge to check progress for

A positive integer indicating the index of the rotation. The rotations are sorted by their start time in descending order. A value of 0 refers to the current or most recent active rotation. Incrementing the value allows you to reference previous rotations.
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
String code for the specific challenge goal to get progress for
Number of goals to skip when returning goal progress list, defaults to 0
Number of goals to include when returning goal progress list, defaults to 20
Array of tag strings used to filter resulting challenge progress list

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChallengeCode, FString const &GoalCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeProgressResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20, TArray< FString > const &Tags={})
memberdef.name: GetChallengeProgress

briefdescription.para: Send a request to get current progress for a specific challenge.

parameterdescription.para: String code for the challenge to check progress for
String code for the specific challenge goal to get progress for
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Number of goals to skip when returning goal progress list, defaults to 0
Number of goals to include when returning goal progress list, defaults to 20
Array of tag strings used to filter resulting challenge progress list

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ChallengeCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeProgressResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20, FString const &GoalCode=TEXT(""), TArray< FString > const &Tags={})
memberdef.name: GetChallengeProgress

briefdescription.para: Send a request to get current progress for a specific challenge.

parameterdescription.para: String code for the challenge to check progress for
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Number of goals to skip when returning goal progress list, defaults to 0
Number of goals to include when returning goal progress list, defaults to 20
String code for the specific challenge goal to get progress for
Array of tag strings used to filter resulting challenge progress list

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeGetRewardStatusResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteModelsChallengeRewardStatus Status=EAccelByteModelsChallengeRewardStatus::NONE, EAccelByteModelsChallengeSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteModelsChallengeSortBy::UPDATED_AT_DESC, uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: GetRewards

briefdescription.para: Send a request to get status of all challenge rewards.

parameterdescription.para: Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Determines what specific rewards should be included in the response, defaults to EAccelByteModelsChallengeRewardStatus::NONE to show all
Determines the order in which the rewards in the response are returned
Number of rewards to skip when returning reward list, defaults to 0
Number of rewards to include when returning reward list, defaults to 20

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsChallengeRewardClaimRequest const &Request, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsChallengeReward > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ClaimReward

briefdescription.para: Send a request to claim a single reward.

parameterdescription.para: Structure containing IDs of rewards to claim
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to attempt to evaluate current progress toward all active challenges.

parameterdescription.para: Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Send a request to attempt to evaluate current progress toward all active challenges.

parameterdescription.para: Struct containing optional parameters to specify the evaluation
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString ChallengeCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeListSchedulesResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FDateTime const &DateTime=FDateTime::MinValue(), uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: ListSchedules

briefdescription.para: Send a request to query the List schedules of given challenge.

parameterdescription.para: String code for the challenge to check the schedules for
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Optional parameter to query schedules prior to specific date time
Number of rewards to skip when returning reward list, defaults to 0
Number of rewards to include when returning reward list, defaults to 20

memberdef.argsstring: (FString ChallengeCode, FString GoalCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChallengeListScheduleByGoalResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint64 Offset=0, uint64 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: ListScheduleByGoal

briefdescription.para: Send a request to query the List schedules of given goal in a challenge.

parameterdescription.para: String code for the challenge to check the schedules for
String code for the specific challenge goal to check the schedules for
Delegate executed when request succeeds
Delegate executed when request fails
Number of rewards to skip when returning reward list, defaults to 0
Number of rewards to include when returning reward list, defaults to 20

briefdescription.para: Interface for interacting with the AccelByte challenge service.
